hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'firebase deploy'; then echo '[hook] Running npm run build before firebase deploy...' && npm run build || (echo '[hook] Build failed — aborting deploy' && exit 1); fi
echo '[hook] File written. If you edited data.js, run npm run dev to verify the page renders correctly.'
echo '[hook] Session ended. Remember to run npm run build && firebase deploy if you want changes live.'

companyAnnouncements: Never commit secrets, API keys, or Firebase tokens to the repository.
All content goes in src/data.js — never hardcode text inside JSX components.
Run npm run build before firebase deploy — always.
